steps.title: Use permissive as clue
steps.content: The passage says Marcus Aurelius's flaw was his mild, overly permissive temperament. The blank must describe what such a person would do with the vices of people around him: tolerate them too leniently rather than oppose them.

steps.title: Reject judgment and restraint
steps.content: B means hate, D means express disapproval, and C means lessen or control. Those actions do not fit an overly permissive temperament. The needed word means to allow or treat with excessive leniency. The answer is A.
